title: ACAMB Conference: Shaping the Future of Banking with AI - FinancialEDGE
description: The fourth edition of the Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference brought together industry experts to discuss the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the banking sector. html:
The fourth edition of the Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference brought together industry experts to discuss the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on the banking sector.

Held in Lagos, the conference themed “AI and The Future of Trust: Reimagining Banking and Financial Services in a Digital First Era” provided a platform for stakeholders to share insights and best practices on harnessing AI to enhance customer trust and experience..

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Jonah Nwokpoku, Team Member Corporate Communication of Unity Bank Plc and Odume Festus,  Editorial / Project Director, Financial Edge at the 2025, Association of Corporate Affairs Managers of Banks (ACAMB) stakeholders conference in Lagos.
